nodeDescription.name: n8n-nodes-preview-dart.dart
nodeDescription.subtitle: ={{$parameter["operation"] + ": " + $parameter["resource"]}}

options.name: Add Task Comment
options.description: Record a new comment that the user intends to add to a given task. This will save the comment in Dart for later access, search, etc.

options.name: List Comments
options.description: List comments for a task with filtering options. Filter by author, text content, or date range. Sort by date or hierarchical thread order. Task ID required. Supports pagination.

options.name: Get Config
options.description: Get information about the user's space, including all of the possible values that can be provided to other endpoints

options.name: Get Dartboard
options.description: Retrieve an existing dartboard. This will return the dartboard's information, including the title and description.

options.name: Create Doc
options.description: Record a new doc that the user intends to write down. This will save the doc in Dart for later access, search, etc. By default the created doc will be in the Docs folder. More information can be included in the text.

options.name: Delete Doc
options.description: Move an existing doc to the trash, where it can be recovered if needed. Nothing else about the doc will be changed.

options.name: Get Doc
options.description: Retrieve an existing doc. This will return the doc's information, including the title, folder, text and others.

options.name: List Docs
options.description: List docs with filtering and search capabilities. Filter by folder, title, text content, or use full-text search. Sort by creation/update date or title. Supports pagination.

options.name: Update Doc
options.description: Update certain properties of an existing doc. This will save the doc in Dart for later access, search, etc. Any properties that are not specified will not be changed.

options.name: Get Folder
options.description: Retrieve an existing folder. This will return the folder's information, including the title, description, all docs within it, and others.

options.name: List Help Center Articles
options.action: List help center articles by query
options.description: Search for up to two help center articles by their semantic similarity to a short (1-5 word) query

options.name: Retrieve Skill By Title
options.description: Retrieve a skill by its title. Skills are user-defined instructions or templates for performing specific task types in the workspace. Returns the skill's title and instructions if found.

options.name: Add Task Time Tracking
options.action: Add a time tracking entry to a task
options.description: Record an additional time tracking entry on a task and return the updated task with refreshed time tracking

options.name: Create Task
options.description: Record a new task that the user intends to do. By default the task will be assigned to the current user, have an unstarted status, have no parent, and be in the default dartboard. More information can be included in the description.

options.name: Delete Task
options.description: Move an existing task to the trash, where it can be recovered if needed. Nothing else about the task will be changed.

options.name: Get Task
options.description: Retrieve an existing task. This will return the task's information, including the title, dartboard, status, description and others.

options.name: List Tasks
options.description: List tasks with powerful filtering options. Filter by dartboard, status, assignee, tags, priority, dates, completion state, view, and more. Supports pagination with limit/offset.

options.name: Move Task
options.action: Move a task within its dartboard
options.description: Move a task to a specific position within results sorted by the order field. Use afterTaskId to place the task after a specific task, or beforeTaskId to place it before one.

options.name: Update Task
options.description: Update properties of an existing task. For customProperties, use property NAME (not ID) as key. Get property names from workspace config. Example: {"customTextProperty": "Some text"}. Fields not provided are unchanged.

options.name: Add Task Attachment From Url
options.action: Attach a file from a provided URL to a task
options.description: Attach a file from a provided URL to a task. The file will be downloaded and attached asynchronously. This operation may take a few moments to complete.

options.name: Get View
options.description: Retrieve an existing view. This will return the view's information, including the title, description, and others.

nodeDescription.subtitle: ={{$parameter["resource"] + ": " + $parameter["operation"]}}

properties.name: resource

options.name: Account
options.description: Retrieve details from your ZeroBounce account

options.name: Validation
options.description: Email validation

options.name: A.I. Scoring
options.description: Email scoring

options.name: Email Finder
options.description: Email Finder allows you to search for new business email addresses using our proprietary technologies

options.name: Domain Search
options.description: Domain Search allows you to search for new business email formats using our proprietary technologies

options.name: Activity Data
options.description: Activity Data allows you to gather insights into your subscribers’ overall email engagement

properties.description: Choose the ZeroBounce API you wish to use

options.name: Credits Balance
options.description: Tells you how many credits you have left on your account

options.name: API Usage
options.description: Retrieves a summary of your API usage

options.name: List Filters
options.description: Lists all the existing filter rules

options.name: Add Filter
options.description: Adds or updates a filter rule

options.name: Delete Filter
options.description: Deletes a filter rule

options.name: Validate Email
options.description: Validate a single email address (real-time)

options.name: Validate Batch
options.description: Validates batches of up to 200 email addresses at a time. It is rate limited to 5 uses per minute, if you exceed the rate limit, you will be blocked for 10 minutes. If you're looking to do single email validations, please use our single email validator endpoint.

options.name: Bulk Validate Send File
options.description: Send a file to ZeroBounce for bulk validation

options.name: Bulk Validate Get File
options.description: Get the results file for a submitted validation file

options.name: Bulk Validate File Status
options.description: Get the status of a file submitted for validation

options.name: Bulk Validate Delete File
options.description: Delete a previously submitted validation file

options.name: Score Email
options.description: Score a single email address (real-time)

options.name: Bulk Scoring Send File
options.description: Send a file to ZeroBounce for bulk scoring

options.name: Bulk Scoring Get File
options.description: Get the results file for a submitted scoring file

options.name: Bulk Scoring File Status
options.description: Get the status of a file submitted for scoring

options.name: Bulk Scoring Delete File
options.description: Delete a previously submitted scoring file

options.name: Find Email Address
options.description: Uses a person’s first and last name and a domain or company name to test a variety of patterns and combinations in real time until it identifies a valid business email. It does not use or process customer data at any point to aid in this search. Privacy and Security Note – Email Finder API searches are performed in real time and do not use stored or processed customer data. Customer privacy and security are and will always remain our top priority.

options.name: Bulk Email Finder Send File
options.description: Send a file to ZeroBounce for bulk email finding

options.name: Bulk Email Finder Get File
options.description: Get the results file for a submitted email finder file

options.name: Bulk Email Finder File Status
options.description: Get the status of a submitted email finder file

options.name: Bulk Email Finder Delete File
options.description: Delete a previously submitted email finder file

options.name: Search Domain
options.description: Domain search is functionally similar to email address inquiry but instead attempts to detect possible patterns a specific company uses. You can use detected patterns to help you approximate the correct email for a specific person you’re attempting to contact at a business. Privacy and security note – Domain Search API searches are performed in real time and do not use stored or processed customer data. Customer privacy and security are and will always remain our top priority.

options.name: Bulk Domain Search Send File
options.description: Send a file to ZeroBounce for bulk domain searching

options.name: Bulk Domain Search Get File
options.description: Get the results file for a submitted domain search file

options.name: Bulk Domain Search File Status
options.description: Get the status of a submitted domain search file

options.name: Bulk Domain Search Delete File
options.description: Delete a previously submitted domain search file

options.name: Activity Data
options.description: Our Activity Data feature allows you to gather insights into your subscribers’ overall email engagement. The tool returns if the email inbox has been active in the past 30, 60, 90, 180, 365, or 365+ days. This indicates a potentially outdated contact, not recommended for cold emailing. Thus, you can improve your targeting and personalization and run more successful email campaigns.

nodeDescription.description: Validate and verify emails using the ZeroBounce API.

attributes.description: Validate and verify emails using the ZeroBounce API.
attributes.name: @zerobounce/n8n-nodes-zerobounce.zeroBounce
